name: Incannex Healthcare Inc.
business: Incannex Healthcare Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative medicines for patients living with serious chronic diseases and significant unmet needs. Its lead drug candidates include IHL-42X for the treatment of obstructive sleep apnea, PSX-001 for generalized anxiety disorder, and IHL-675A for rheumatoid arthritis. The company has not yet generated any revenue from product sales and does not expect to until regulatory approval is obtained.
sellsTo: Patients diagnosed with obstructive sleep apnea
Patients diagnosed with generalized anxiety disorder

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative medicines for patients living with serious chronic diseases and significant unmet needs.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 2 portion of the RePOSA Study for IHL-42X
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 2 portion of the RePOSA Study was completed in July 2025 and demonstrated statistically and clinically significant improvements across multiple key endpoints for patients receiving IHL-42X compared to placebo.

catalysts.event: Initiation of a multi-jurisdiction Phase 2 clinical trial for PSX-001
catalysts.sentence: We have a cleared Investigational New Drug (IND) application with the FDA and are preparing to initiate a multi-jurisdiction Phase 2 clinical trial in 2026.

catalysts.event: End of Phase 2 meeting with FDA for IHL-42X
catalysts.sentence: We are finalizing arrangements for our End of Phase meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA ) to obtain guidance on planned next steps, including a pivotal Phase 3 trial design.

tamClaims.claim: The estimated addressable global market opportunity for OSA medical devices is approximately US$8.2 billion, with an estimated compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.33% from 2024 to 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: The estimated addressable global market opportunity for OSA medical devices is approximately US$8.2 billion, with an estimated compound annual growth rate ( CAGR ) of 7.33% from 2024 to 2029.
